steps.name: check-deps
steps.description: Verify task dependencies (none for this task).

steps.name: init-folders
steps.description: Initialize the mandatory task folder structure.

steps.name: research-papers
steps.description: Skipped: this task IS the literature survey; the 10 target papers are listed in the task description.

steps.name: research-internet
steps.description: Skipped: paper identity resolution and metadata collection are part of the add-paper skill in implementation.

steps.name: research-code
steps.description: Skipped: literature survey produces paper assets only; no prior task code is consumed.

steps.name: planning
steps.description: Write plan/plan.md describing how 10 papers will be added in parallel via add-paper sub-agents and how the synthesis will be produced.

steps.name: implementation
steps.description: Add 10 paper assets via add-paper sub-agents (parallelism capped at 3 concurrent), then write results/results_summary.md and results/results_detailed.md syntheses.

steps.name: teardown
steps.description: Skipped: no remote compute to tear down.

steps.name: creative-thinking
steps.description: Skipped: not in literature-survey optional step list; the synthesis step in implementation already maps findings to candidate experiments.

steps.name: results
steps.description: Verify results files exist and pass verify_task_results.

steps.name: compare-literature
steps.description: Skipped: this entire task is a literature comparison; comparison is folded into results_detailed.md.

steps.name: suggestions
steps.description: Write results/suggestions.json with follow-up suggestions derived from the synthesis.

steps.name: reporting
steps.description: Open PR, run pre-merge verificator, merge, refresh overview/.
